stories:
one of those fruits?". "Sure son!" the dad replied. Then as his father watched, Jimmy bit into the fruit and he began to vomit blood. Then Jimmy fainted, and he lost consciousness. When he woke up, he was looking up at the same tree that had the strange fruit. He felt a chill run through him as he saw his father lying there on the ground. And then he felt a strange sensation, like electricity, as he saw his dead father standing on a white platform.
